text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Education > English as a Second Language * Day Laborers 1 Matching Service Providers The mapped locations are estimates, for the exact location of an individual site, select "More Details" Refine Results - Select - No Filter Day Laborers Hispanic/Latino Community Accessibility Options - Select - No Filter Wheelchair Access (Full) Wheelchair Access (Partial) Accessible Parking (Private Lot) Accessible Parking (Nearby Public/Street Parking) Accessible Restrooms Alternative Communication Formats Virtual Service Options Staff Trained in Disability Awareness Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF VOZ WORKERS' RIGHTS EDUCATION PROJECT VOZ WORKER CENTER AND ADMINISTRATIVE OFFICE VOZ WORKERS CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a hire site center for day laborers. Minimum wage is $22 per hour for general labor. Offers educational classes for day laborers, including Health and Safety and ESL. 3575 NE Broadway Street Portland, OR 97232 Eligibility: Day laborers and immigrants Hours: Monday-Friday 7am-2pm, Saturday 7am-noon Email (503) 234-2043 Get Directions Visit Website More Details VOZ WORKERS' RIGHTS EDUCATION PROJECT VOZ WORKERS CENTER
